title: Add database schema for learning system (task_outcomes, learned_patterns, pattern_applications)
context: Implementing Milestone 1 of agent learning system. See design doc at docs/agent-learning-system.md and detailed spec at docs/handoffs/learning-system-milestone-1.md (Task 1). Need 3 new tables: task_outcomes (captures what happened after task completion including human feedback), learned_patterns (extracted lessons from outcomes), pattern_applications (tracks when patterns were applied to tasks). This enables closed-loop learning where agents improve from past outcomes.
acceptance: Migration runs successfully. TaskOutcome, LearnedPattern, PatternApplication models added to app/models.py with all fields per spec. All indexes created (agent_type, outcome_type, active, etc). Pydantic schemas added. Can create and query records via ORM. Unit tests verify model creation and relationships.
